violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Meat in Freezer not date marked.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop in bar area was not stored handle up to prevent contamination.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Hamburger patties, bacon etc not date marked in refrigerator.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Alum. Foil used on side of grill and for holding utensils next to grill. Employee states removes every day.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. 2 comp of 3 comp sink was being used to wash and sanitize dishes. Rinse process was not being used. Explained wash, rinse and sanitize.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Doors are not self closing in restrooms.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
